name: DailyBriefing
description: The single 'today' record that drives the Dashboard briefing console: readiness dial (score/label/delta), the coordinates strip (elevation/wind/window), the serif verdict headline and status line, the suggested-workout CTA, and the coach transmission (message/directive/signature). The dashboard reads the most-recent briefing; most fields are nullable so the empty and partial-data states render gracefully.

name: Vital
description: One overnight telemetry row shown in the Vitals section (HRV, Resting HR, Sleep, Steps, and future metrics). Flat and standalone so the partial-data scenario simply seeds fewer rows. Carries a display order, a formatted value + optional unit, an optional trend chip, a 0-100 track fill percentage, and a 'positive' flag that colors the track mint (good) versus signal-blue.

name: Workout
description: A logged activity. On the Dashboard it feeds the Field Log (yesterday's activity); on the Activity Timeline it is one dated entry among others. Carries a title, photo caption, documentary photo URL (forced grayscale in the UI), and distance/pace/vertical/duration stats, plus an occurredAt timestamp for chronological placement and a kind ('run' | 'ride' | 'strength' | 'walk' | 'yoga' | ...) that drives the timeline's type-filter chips. Zero rows in the no-workout scenarios, which trigger the relevant empty state.

name: Mood
description: A daily check-in entry shown on the Activity Timeline: a subjective snapshot logged in the morning or evening. Carries an occurredAt timestamp, partOfDay ('morning' | 'evening'), 1-5 self-ratings for energy / sleep quality / soreness / stress, a short mood word (e.g. 'Steady'), and an optional free-text note. Feeds the timeline's 'Mood' filter chip and the check-in detail view.

name: Weight
description: A body-weight reading shown on the Activity Timeline. Carries an occurredAt timestamp, a formatted value and unit (default 'lb'), an optional trend delta chip (e.g. '▼0.4'), and a 'positive' flag that colors the trend mint (good) versus signal-blue. Feeds the timeline's 'Weight' filter chip and the weight detail view.

name: ProviderConnection
description: A persisted connection between Wellframe and an AI coach or health-data provider. Production starts with zero rows (day-one: everything shows 'Connect'); connecting a provider writes a row here and the panel/dashboard reflect real connected/synced state. Records which provider (providerId), whether it's an AI coach or health source (kind), how it was connected (method: browser sign-in / pasted API key / local endpoint / local MCP), the resulting status and status-line detail, an optional endpoint for local/MCP methods, whether an AI connection is the active coach (only one true at a time), and when it connected.
